Bug / Task Description: IPv4 classification rejects perfectly valid addresses whose octets are 255 (for example 192.168.1.255 or 255.255.255.0 are misclassified as generic strings instead of IPv4 addresses). A dotted-quad octet is valid for the whole 0..255 range, inclusive of 255. Fix the octet range validation so 255 is accepted.
Commit Subject: fix(valueshape): accept 255 as a valid IPv4 octet
